nativePolicy: The fieldset and legend provide native group naming.
Home, End, and arrows move and select while skipping disabled options.
The horizontal scroller preserves touch and keyboard access at narrow widths.
Uncontrolled native forms restore defaultValue on reset and required applies to each radio.

compositionPolicy.familySignature: Connected Ink segments use a Green selected rail and the shared Violet focus seam.
compositionPolicy.enhancement: renderSelectionSummary adds a live workbench summary rail; omitting it removes the rail and live region.
